heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
label: 991, 992 Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
notes: Section 991, , pt. II, § 248, , provided for discharge of commissioned officers and other members of reserve components. See sections 12681 and 12682 of Title 10, Armed Forces.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 495
Section 992, , pt. II, § 249, , related to limitation on discharges, dropping from rolls, and character of discharge. See sections 12683 to 12686 of Title 10.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 495
amendments: Section 991, , pt. II, § 248, , provided for discharge of commissioned officers and other members of reserve components. See sections 12681 and 12682 of Title 10, Armed Forces.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 495
Section 992, , pt. II, § 249, , related to limitation on discharges, dropping from rolls, and character of discharge. See sections 12683 to 12686 of Title 10.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 495
